message:
perf(rate_limit): use atomic counter for anti-barge check instead of RwLock

Replace the RwLock read acquisition in try_acquire() with a lockless
AtomicU32 `pending_queue_count` check. This avoids taking the queue
lock on the fast path when no waiters are pending, reducing
contention under high concurrency.

The counter tracks only pending (not-yet-granted) entries, so
zombie entries that have been granted or timed out but not yet
claimed do not cause false anti-barge rejections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
